qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Command injection in SSH disk operations allows arbitrary command execution on Proxmox nodes
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The advisory describes an insecure sudoers documentation recommendation allowing path traversal via ../ in the tee command path (CWE-22/CWE-1188). This finding describes command injection through unsanitized file_id concatenation in shell commands during disk import (disk.go:328-338). Different vulnerable code, different root cause, different vulnerability class.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: OS Command Injection in Custom Disk Creation via User-Controlled Input
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The advisory describes an insecure sudoers documentation recommendation allowing path traversal via ../ in the tee command path (CWE-22/CWE-1188). This finding describes command injection through direct concatenation of user-controlled fields into shell commands in createCustomDisk (disk.go:328-340). Different vulnerable code, different root cause, different vulnerability class.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Insufficient Shell Command Escaping in SSH Command Execution
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The advisory describes an insecure sudoers documentation recommendation allowing path traversal via ../ in the tee command path (CWE-22/CWE-1188). This finding describes insufficient single-quote escaping in the executeCommands function (ssh/client.go:290-297) enabling shell metacharacter injection. Different vulnerable code, different root cause, different vulnerability class.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Path Traversal Vulnerability in File Upload Operations via User-Controlled Filename
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: While both this finding and the advisory involve path traversal via ../, the vulnerable code and root cause are different. The advisory root cause is the documentation recommending an insecure sudoers wildcard rule for /usr/bin/tee /var/lib/vz/* that allows path traversal in the tee path argument. This finding's root cause is the NodeUpload/NodeStreamUpload functions (ssh/client.go:350-371) using unsanitized user-controlled d.FileName in SFTP filepath.Join operations. Different code path (SFTP vs sudo tee), different root cause (missing filename sanitization vs insecure sudoers configuration).

target_advisory_judgement.reason: The advisory (GHSA-gwch-7m8v-7544) describes an insecure sudoers documentation recommendation in terraform-provider-proxmox: the suggested sudoers line 'terraform ALL=(root) NOPASSWD: /usr/bin/tee /var/lib/vz/*' allows path traversal via ../ to write arbitrary files using the tee command. None of the four qualifying findings identify this root cause. Findings 1-3 describe command injection through unsanitized shell command construction in disk operations and SSH execution (different vulnerability class, different vulnerable code). Finding 4 describes path traversal in SFTP file upload via NodeUpload/NodeStreamUpload (same CWE-22 family but different vulnerable code path and root cause: SFTP filepath.Join vs sudoers wildcard for tee command). No finding addresses the documentation-level sudoers misconfiguration or the tee command path traversal mechanism described in the advisory.
evidence: Advisory root cause: documentation-recommended sudoers line 'terraform ALL=(root) NOPASSWD: /usr/bin/tee /var/lib/vz/*' allows ../ path traversal in tee path argument
Advisory CWE: CWE-1188 (Initialization with Hard-Coded Network Resource Configuration) and CWE-22 (Path Traversal)
Advisory fix: changed documentation to use strict regex sudoers rule (commit bd604c41a31e2a55dd6acc01b0608be3ea49c023)
Finding 1 (ssh-command-injection-in-disk-operations): command injection via file_id concatenation in disk.go shell commands
Finding 2 (vuln_command_injection_disk_creation): command injection in createCustomDisk via disk.go:328-340
Finding 3 (vuln_command_injection_ssh_execution): insufficient single-quote escaping in executeCommands ssh/client.go:290-297
Finding 4 (vuln_path_traversal_file_upload): path traversal in SFTP NodeUpload/NodeStreamUpload via ssh/client.go:350-371, different code path than tee-based sudoers path traversal
